briefdescription.para: This file contains the code related to authenticating the JTAG access.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
2.3 har 09/26/2025 Initial release 2.4 abh 11/20/2025 Fixed MISRA-C violations tvp 03/05/2026 Use XLoader_AuthKey to accommodate new algorithms support sk 04/02/2026 Moved TAP unlock defines to Header file vns 04/04/2026 Added JtagUnlockedByAuth flag to XLoader_AuthJtagStatus and XLoader_DisableJtagIfOpenedByAuthJtag to lock DAP during PLM update sri 04/24/2026 Added LMS support for authenticated JTAG message
